Title: User initiates flash activity
Test Steps: 1. User triggers flash activity
Expected Result: Flash activity is initiated and control passes to U-environment

Title: User registers in the system
Test Steps:
1. User provides valid registration details
2. Registration activity is triggered
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and control returns to U-environment

Title: User registration fails due to invalid input
Test Steps:
1. User provides invalid registration details
2. Registration activity is triggered
Expected Result: Registration fails with appropriate error message

Title: User logs into the system
Test Steps:
1. User enters valid login credentials
2. Login activity is triggered
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and control returns to U-environment

Title: User login fails due to incorrect credentials
Test Steps:
1. User enters incorrect login credentials
2. Login activity is triggered
Expected Result: Login fails with appropriate error message

Title: User subscribes to newsletter
Test Steps:
1. User triggers newsletter subscription
2. Newsletter activity is triggered
Expected Result: User is subscribed to the newsletter and control returns to U-environment

Title: User unsubscribes from newsletter
Preconditions: User is subscribed to the newsletter
Test Steps:
1. User triggers newsletter unsubscription
2. Newsletter activity is triggered
Expected Result: User is unsubscribed from the newsletter and control returns to U-environment

Title: User creates an event
Test Steps:
1. User provides event details
2. Create event activity is triggered
Expected Result: Event is created successfully and control returns to U-environment

Title: User creates an event with invalid details
Test Steps:
1. User provides invalid event details
2. Create event activity is triggered
Expected Result: Event creation fails with appropriate error message

Title: User joins or views an event
Test Steps:
1. User selects an event to join or view
2. Join/view event activity is triggered
Expected Result: User can join or view the selected event and control returns to U-environment

Title: User attempts to join a non-existent event
Test Steps:
1. User tries to join a non-existent event
2. Join/view event activity is triggered
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating the event does not exist

Title: User accesses their profile
Test Steps:
1. User triggers profile access
2. Profile activity is triggered
Expected Result: User's profile information is displayed and control returns to U-environment

Title: User exits the system
Test Steps:
1. User triggers exit activity
2. Exit activity is triggered
Expected Result: User is logged out and session is terminated

Title: User interacts with Postgresol
Test Steps:
1. User triggers interaction with Postgresol
2. Postgresol activity is triggered
Expected Result: Interaction with Postgresol is successful and control returns to U-environment

Title: User interaction with Postgresol fails
Test Steps:
1. User triggers interaction with Postgresol using an invalid query
2. Postgresol activity is triggered
Expected Result: Interaction with Postgresol fails with appropriate error message

Title: User triggers notification center
Test Steps:
1. User triggers notification center
2. Notification center activity is triggered
Expected Result: Notification is sent successfully and control returns to U-environment

Title: User triggers notification center with invalid data
Test Steps:
1. User triggers notification center with invalid data
2. Notification center activity is triggered
Expected Result: Notification fails with appropriate error message

Title: User triggers newsletter management
Test Steps:
1. User triggers newsletter management actions
2. Newsletter management activity is triggered
Expected Result: Newsletter management actions are processed successfully and control returns to U-environment

Title: User triggers newsletter management with invalid actions
Test Steps:
1. User triggers newsletter management actions with invalid data
2. Newsletter management activity is triggered
Expected Result: Newsletter management actions fail with appropriate error message

Title: User triggers flash activity again after exiting
Test Steps:
1. User triggers flash activity again
2. Flash activity is triggered
Expected Result: User is prompted to log in again before proceeding with flash activity

Title: User triggers multiple activities in sequence
Test Data: Multiple activities (registration, login, newsletter, event creation)
Test Steps:
1. User triggers registration activity
2. User triggers login activity
3. User triggers newsletter activity
4. User triggers event creation activity
Expected Result: All activities are processed successfully in sequence and control returns to U-environment

Title: User triggers multiple activities in parallel
Test Data: Multiple activities (registration, login, newsletter, event creation)
Test Steps:
1. User triggers registration activity
2. Simultaneously, user triggers login activity
3. Simultaneously, user triggers newsletter activity
4. Simultaneously, user triggers event creation activity
Expected Result: Activities are processed concurrently and control returns to U-environment

Title: User triggers multiple activities in reverse order
Test Data: Multiple activities (event creation, newsletter, login, registration)
Test Steps:
1. User triggers event creation activity
2. User triggers newsletter activity
3. User triggers login activity
4. User triggers registration activity
Expected Result: Activities are processed in reverse order and control returns to U-environment

Title: User triggers multiple activities with invalid data
Test Data: Invalid activities (registration, login, newsletter, event creation)
Test Steps:
1. User triggers registration activity with invalid data
2. User triggers login activity with invalid data
3. User triggers newsletter activity with invalid data
4. User triggers event creation activity with invalid data
Expected Result: Activities fail with appropriate error messages and control returns to U-environment

Title: User triggers multiple activities with mixed valid and invalid data
Test Data: Mixed valid and invalid activities (registration, login, newsletter, event creation)
Test Steps:
1. User triggers registration activity with valid data
2. User triggers login activity with invalid data
3. User triggers newsletter activity with valid data
4. User triggers event creation activity with invalid data
Expected Result: Valid activities succeed, invalid activities fail with appropriate error messages, and control returns to U-environment

Title: User triggers multiple activities with edge cases
Test Data: Edge case activities (registration, login, newsletter, event creation)
Test Steps:
1. User triggers registration activity with edge case data (minimum length username)
2. User triggers login activity with edge case data (minimum length password)
3. User triggers newsletter activity with edge case data (maximum allowed characters)
4. User triggers event creation activity with edge case data (maximum allowed characters)
Expected Result: Activities succeed with edge case data and control returns to U-environment

Title: User triggers multiple activities with extreme edge cases
Test Data: Extreme edge case activities (registration, login, newsletter, event creation)
Test Steps:
1. User triggers registration activity with extreme edge case data (empty username)
2. User triggers login activity with extreme edge case data (empty password)
3. User triggers newsletter activity with extreme edge case data (exceeding maximum allowed characters)
4. User triggers event creation activity with extreme edge case data (exceeding maximum allowed characters)
Expected Result: Activities fail with appropriate error messages and control returns to U-environment

Title: User triggers multiple activities with special characters
Test Data: Special character activities (registration, login, newsletter, event creation)
Test Steps:
1. User triggers registration activity with special characters (username contains !@#)
2. User triggers login activity with special characters (password contains !@#)
3. User triggers newsletter activity with special characters (subject contains !@#)
4. User triggers event creation activity with special characters (title contains !@#)
Expected Result: Activities succeed with special characters and control returns to U-environment

Title: User triggers multiple activities with non-alphanumeric characters
Test Data: Non-alphanumeric character activities (registration, login, newsletter, event creation)
Test Steps:
1. User triggers registration activity with non-alphanumeric characters (username contains spaces)
2. User triggers login activity with non-alphanumeric characters (password contains spaces)
3. User triggers newsletter activity with non-alphanumeric characters (subject contains spaces)
4. User triggers event creation activity with non-alphanumeric characters (title contains spaces)
Expected Result: Activities succeed with non-alphanumeric characters and control returns to U-environment
